commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3c8975344e43f616911284bfb97d5733fd68c6f5)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes MiniMax image, OAuth, TTS, and video success JSON parsing from unbounded `response.json()` calls to bounded response reads and updates MiniMax video tests to use real `Response` objects.

PR surface: Source +38, Tests +25. Total +63 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level. Current main still has raw `response.json()` reads on MiniMax image, OAuth device-code, and video success responses; I did not run a live MiniMax call in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review and author action are needed because the branch conflicts with main, overlaps active response-limit PRs, and missing contributor proof cannot be supplied by an automated repair lane.

target.title: fix(minimax): bound JSON response reads to prevent OOM
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Replace unbounded `await response.json()` with `readResponseWithLimit` (1 MiB cap)
across MiniMax image-generation, OAuth, TTS, and video-generation providers
(6 call sites in 4 files).

## Evidence

```
pnpm exec vitest run extensions/minimax/video-generation-provider.test.ts extensions/minimax/image-generation-provider.test.ts extensions/minimax/tts.test.ts extensions/minimax/oauth.test.ts extensions/minimax/music-generation-provider.test.ts extensions/minimax/index.test.ts extensions/minimax/model-definitions.test.ts extensions/minimax/onboard.test.ts extensions/minimax/provider-discovery.contract.test.ts

 Test Files  9 passed (9)
      Tests  81 passed (81)
```

### Bounded overflow test

- `rejects oversized poll JSON response and cancels the stream` — verifies > 1 MiB response is rejected and stream is cancelled

### Mock fixes

Replaced all `{ json: async () => ... }` fake Response objects in video-generation-provider.test.ts with real `new Response(...)` or `jsonResponse()` helper.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
target.author: lsr911
